7250 Perkins Rd #433, Baton Rouge, LA 70808, USA

Berries can be found all along the tree line when they are in season. You can go onto the primitive trail and looks on the sides of the trail for even more berries. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: April-May.
Fruit, behind a wooden fence. The tree is small, but once it grows larger, will spill over the fence. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Several smallish fig trees along this street, but production looked good (they were still green 6/11/2013) Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
